HomePage.title: Influencer Marketing Platform - Connect Brands with Creators
HomePage.description: Connect instantly with millions of authentic and relevant influencers in your niche to create and publish videos and photos of your products.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple and fast, whether you are a brand or a creator
howItWorks.brandStep1Desc: Search and filter millions of niche influencers by audience, engagement, and content style
howItWorks.brandStep2Desc: Reach out directly or launch a campaign to receive applications from interested creators
howItWorks.brandStep3Desc: Manage contracts, content approvals, and payments all in one place
howItWorks.creatorStep1Desc: Showcase your content, audience metrics, and rates to attract brand deals
howItWorks.creatorStep2Desc: Brands search for creators like you every day — get matched with relevant campaigns
howItWorks.creatorStep3Desc: Create authentic content, submit for approval, and get paid securely through the platform

features.title: Why Choose Our Platform
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run successful influencer marketing campaigns
features.feature1Desc: AI-powered algorithm matches your brand with the most relevant influencers based on niche, audience, and engagement
features.feature2Desc: End-to-end campaign tracking from outreach to content delivery — manage dozens of creators effortlessly
features.feature3Desc: Centralized content approvals, asset storage, and revision tracking to keep your brand consistent
features.feature4Desc: Real-time ROI, engagement metrics, and conversion tracking to measure campaign success
features.feature5Desc: Escrow-protected creator payments with flexible pricing models — fixed, commission, or product gifting
features.feature6Desc: Support for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and more — manage all your social campaigns in one dashboard

testimonials.title: Loved by Brands and Creators
testimonials.subtitle: See what our community says about working together
testimonials.quote1: We scaled our influencer program from 5 to 200 creators in 3 months. The matching algorithm saved us countless hours of manual outreach.
testimonials.quote2: This platform helped me land consistent brand deals that actually fit my niche. My monthly revenue doubled within two months.
testimonials.quote3: The campaign management tools are a game changer. We can track content, approvals, and payments for 50+ influencers without chaos.

bottomCta.title: Ready to scale your influencer marketing?
bottomCta.subtitle: Join thousands of brands and creators already collaborating on our platform

metadata.title: Template Library - AgentPlanet
metadata.description: Browse our Agent team template library, including content creation, e-commerce, customer support, and other business scenarios

Templates.title: Template Library
Templates.subtitle: Choose the suitable Agent team template for your business scenarios, one-click deploy to OpenClaw

detail.copyPrompt: Copy the prompt below and send it to OpenClaw to install in one click
detail.installCommand: Use curl or browser skill to visit the "https://agentplanet.io/api/v1/templates/{slug}/install" link, and follow the instructions in the link to install and configure the agents.
detail.step1: Copy the prompt to OpenClaw for one-click installation
detail.step3: Ask OpenClaw to verify the current agent configuration
detail.contactSupportDesc: If you encounter any problems during use, please contact us

Install.title: Deployment Guide - AgentPlanet
Install.description: Detailed OpenClaw deployment and configuration guide to help you quickly deploy AI Agent team templates
Install.subheader: Follow these steps to quickly deploy an Agent team template in OpenClaw

prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
prerequisites.desc: Before starting, ensure you have the following:

steps.step1Desc2: , choose the Agent team template for your business scenarios, and click the "Copy Install Command" button.
steps.step2Desc: Send the copied install command directly to OpenClaw in a conversation for one-click installation
steps.step3Desc: After installation, command OpenClaw to restart the Gateway service to load the new configuration. Or restart the service manually using the following command:
steps.step4Desc: After restarting, you can verify if the deployment is successful in the following ways:
steps.step4Item1: Check the Agent list in the OpenClaw console to confirm all roles are online
steps.step4Item2: Try sending a test message to the Agent to check if the response is normal
steps.step4Item3: Check the Gateway logs to confirm there are no error messages

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1Desc: Check if the OpenClaw Gateway is running normally and if the configuration directory path is correct. Ensure the configuration file is placed in the correct templates subdirectory.
faq.q2Desc: Ensure the current user has read and write permissions to the OpenClaw configuration directory. On Linux/macOS, you may need to use the chmod command to modify permissions.

About.title: About Us
About.description: Learn about our vision and mission to connect brands with authentic niche influencers
About.intro: We are an influencer marketing platform built to connect brands with authentic, niche content creators. Our mission is to make brand-creator collaboration seamless, scalable, and rewarding for both sides.
About.visionDesc: To become the go-to platform where every brand, from startups to enterprises, can discover and collaborate with the perfect creators for their message — and where every creator can turn their passion into sustainable income.
About.feature1: AI-powered smart matching between brands and relevant influencers
About.feature2: End-to-end campaign management from outreach to content delivery
About.feature3: Secure escrow-protected payments with flexible pricing models
About.feature4: Multi-platform support for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and more
About.contactDesc: If you have any questions or suggestions, please feel free to contact us:

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information
Privacy.overviewDesc: We ("we", "our", or "this platform") are committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. By using our services, you agree to the practices described in this privacy policy.
Privacy.collectDesc: The types of information we collect include:
Privacy.collectItem1: Account Information: When you register for an account, we collect your email address, username, and password.
Privacy.collectItem2: Usage Data: We collect information about how you interact with our platform, including pages visited, campaigns created, influencers discovered, and features used.
Privacy.collectItem3: Technical Information: Including your IP address, browser type, operating system, and device information.
Privacy.collectItem4: Cookies and Similar Technologies: We use cookies to improve user experience and analyze website traffic.
Privacy.useDesc: We use the collected information to:
Privacy.useItem1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Privacy.useItem2: Process your account registration and login
Privacy.useItem3: Send you service notifications and updates
Privacy.useItem4: Respond to your inquiries and requests
Privacy.useItem5: Analyze usage trends to optimize user experience
Privacy.securityDesc: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. However, please note that no method of internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure.
Privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We may use third-party service providers to assist us in operating our platform and providing services. These providers only access your information when necessary and are obligated to protect its security and confidentiality.
Privacy.rightsDesc: Depending on applicable data protection laws, you may have the following rights:
Privacy.rightsItem4: Restrict or object to processing your information
Privacy.updatesDesc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated date. We recommend you review this policy regularly for any changes.
Privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us:

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.description: Read our Terms of Service to understand the rules and conditions for using our platform
Terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing or using this platform (hereinafter referred to as "this platform"), you signify that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, please do not use this platform.
Terms.servicesDesc: This platform provides an influencer marketing marketplace that connects brands with content creators. We enable users to discover influencers, manage campaigns, collaborate on content, and process payments. We do not guarantee specific campaign results, influencer availability, or content performance.
Terms.userConductDesc: When using this platform, you agree not to engage in the following behaviors:
Terms.conductItem1: Violate any applicable laws, regulations, or rules;
Terms.conductItem2: Infringe on the intellectual property, privacy rights, or other legal rights of others;
Terms.conductItem3: Upload, post, or transmit any content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, vulgar, obscene, or infringing;
Terms.conductItem4: Interfere with or disrupt the normal operation of this platform or its related servers and networks;
Terms.conductItem5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of this platform. Unauthorized access or use of this platform may result in criminal and/or civil prosecution.
Terms.ipDesc1: Platform Content: All content on this platform, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, button icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads, and data compilations, is the property of this platform or its content suppliers and is protected by applicable copyright laws.
Terms.ipDesc2: User Content: Creators and brands retain ownership of the content they upload to their profiles and campaigns. By uploading content, you grant us a limited license to display and distribute it solely for the purpose of operating and promoting the platform.
Terms.disclaimerDesc: This platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, as to the operation of this platform or the information, content, materials, or products included on it. You expressly agree that your use of this platform is at your sole risk. We do not warrant that this platform, its servers, or e-mails sent from this platform are free of viruses or other harmful components.
Terms.limitationDesc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, punitive, or consequential damages arising from the use of this platform or as a result of using this platform, including but not limited to loss of profits, data loss, or business interruption.
Terms.modificationsDesc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. The modified terms will be posted on this page with the last updated date. Your continued use of this platform signifies your acceptance of the modified terms.
Terms.governingLawDesc: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with local laws, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
Terms.contactDesc: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
